title: eragrostis brainii
intro: Eragrostis brainii, also known as Bristle grass, is a species of grass native to Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eragrostis brainii include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Eragrostis brainii is typically prepared for herbal use in the form of infusions, decoctions, or as a tincture, and is often used in traditional African medicine to treat various ailments.
